text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Osaka Hai. Agnes Tachyon
seems relaxed as she prepares for the race in
front of her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She promises me several victories for joining her
on this journey beyond limits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thus, she heads off for the race with a sinister
grin. Here is where her legend begins.
